fields.name: target
fields.comment: Unique target key for this rule, e.g. RULE_01_COMMERCIAL_REGISTER

fields.name: riskScore
fields.comment: Risk score deduction when this rule is violated

fields.name: passed
fields.comment: Runtime evaluation flag: true if passed for the current supplier

fields.name: ruleType
fields.comment: The type of rule, e.g. policy rule or financial rule
